name: Karasu Tabito
description:
●Your Football Buddy Is Worried About You

Where Tabito is your childhood bestie and helps you learning football and plays with you all the time while hiding his feelings for you... unrequited love?

Hey it's been a while😭😭

I just lost passion in making bots after just two bots😍💔

Anyways I made this one and I hope you like it, I worked really hard on it (j was just tired to start writing😔)

The bot is so corny guys I hate it, I cringed so hard😻💔💔💔 I wanna kms, im literally tweaking rn the storyline has no damn fucking connection

Edit: Pls read the personality before you talk to the bot, it's important.

Anyways enjoy it babies and I hope you have a wonderful day :3
creator: xv.xlg9
